name: O.R.C. Bee
description: The O.R.C. Bee is the militarized airborne version of the bee in Grounded 2. It keeps the same mobility and reach, but the O.R.C. network turns it into a much more persistent flying escort.
behavior: It patrols high above pumpkins, the statue, and O.R.C. wave zones, but commits to combat faster than a normal bee. Once it lines up on you, it tends to chain dives and stings without giving up pressure.
interactionWithPlayer: It attacks as soon as you are in range and nearby O.R.C. bees can join in quickly. If you stand still after the first block, the pollen cloud takes away your safest footing.
interactionWithCreatures: It usually circles above grounded O.R.C. patrols and dives in once another unit has already pinned you down.
strategy: The safest opener is still ranged damage followed by punishes when it drops lower. Eye shots and leaving the pollen cloud immediately are the difference between a clean fight and a messy one.

combatStats.attackDamageSummary: Bite: 62.5. Combo Sting: 75. Charged Sting: 100. Pollen Cloud: 31.25.

abilities.name: Bite
abilities.description: A quick close-range snap used once it is already in your face.

abilities.name: Combo Sting
abilities.description: It chains several stings together while hovering at your level.

abilities.name: Charged Sting
abilities.description: It pulls back briefly before driving the stinger in with much more force.

abilities.name: Pollen Cloud
abilities.description: It shakes its legs and drops a pollen cloud that makes standing underneath it unsafe.
